hero.sub: Calling Matrix is the 24/7 AI receptionist built for HVAC, plumbing, electrical, roofing, and cleaning businesses. It answers questions, books and cancels appointments, and follows up with every customer — in a voice that sounds human.
marquee.label: Connects with your favorite tools
problem.label: 01 / The problem
problem.title: Every missed call is a job on your competitor's truck.
problem.sub: Home service customers don't leave voicemails. They don't wait until Monday. They call the next business on the list — and that's where your revenue goes.
problem.stat1.p: Across HVAC, plumbing, and electrical, the average shop misses 6 of every 10 inbound calls during a busy week.
problem.stat2.h3: Average value of a missed call
problem.stat2.p: A missed service call isn't just a lead — it's the full lifetime value of a customer who was ready to book today.
problem.stat3.h3: of callers won't leave a voicemail
problem.stat3.p: They'll call the next shop on Google Maps before you've finished the current job. Nine out of ten never call back.
problem.tagline: You shouldn't have to choose between answering the phone and actually doing the job you're paid for.
feat.label: 02 / What it does
feat.title: A receptionist that never clocks out, never forgets to follow up.
feat.sub: Trained on your services, your pricing, your territory. Built to sound like the best dispatcher you've ever hired.
feat1.h3: Answers every call — 2 a.m., holidays, during the Super Bowl.
feat1.p: No voicemail. No call tree. No "please hold." Calling Matrix picks up in under two seconds, every single time. The burst pipe at midnight gets booked before your competitor's phone even rings.
feat2.h3: Books & reschedules — straight into your calendar.
feat2.p: Integrates with Housecall Pro, ServiceTitan, Jobber, and Google Calendar. Checks your team's availability, respects territory rules, holds the slot.
feat3.h3: Sounds like a human — a good one.
feat3.p: Interrupts naturally, handles "um," accents, bad reception. Picks up your dispatcher's best lines.
feat4.h3: Follows up automatically — by text and call.
feat4.p: Confirms appointments, chases no-shows, re-engages quotes that went cold. Brings back 1 in 5 on average.
feat5.h3: Plugs into what you already run.
feat5.p: Port your number in 24 hours. Keep your existing CRM, dispatcher, and tech stack.
how.label: 03 / How it works
how.title: Live in 48 hours. Booking jobs the same afternoon.
step1.p: 30-minute onboarding call. We capture your services, pricing, territory, emergency protocols, and tone — then build a voice that matches the shop.
step2.p: Your existing business line forwards or ports to Calling Matrix. Customers keep dialing the number on the back of the truck.
step3.p: Direct, two-way sync with Housecall Pro, ServiceTitan, Jobber, or Google Calendar. Bookings appear in real time.
step4.h4: We go live — and keep tuning.
step4.p: You get a live dashboard, every call recording, and a human specialist who tunes the AI monthly based on what your customers actually ask.
panel1.p: A 30-minute call where we capture everything your dispatcher knows.
panel2.p: Your business line rings through to Calling Matrix in under 24 hours.
panel3.p: Bookings drop into Housecall Pro, ServiceTitan, Jobber, or Google Cal in real time.
panel4.p: Live dashboard, recordings, and monthly tuning by a real human specialist.
proof.label: 04 / Proof
why.label: 05 / Why Calling Matrix
why.title: The answering service playbook, rewritten for 2026.
pricing.label: 06 / Pricing
pricing.title: Pay less than a part-time hire. Book more than a full team.
pricing.sub: Every plan includes unlimited minutes, calendar integration, call recording, and monthly human tuning. No per-call fees. No overage surprises.
faq.label: 07 / FAQ
faq.title: Questions we get on every demo call.
final.title: Your phone is ringing right now.
final.sub: Every minute you wait is a call that goes to voicemail — or to a competitor who picked up.
footer.tagline: 24/7 AI receptionist for home service businesses. Answer every call. Book every job.
